---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for uDosGo
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
What problem would this feature solve? Describe the pain point or limitation.

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## uDoui Extension?
Would this work as a uDoui extension? (See `udoui/extensions/` for reference)

- [ ] Yes, this could be a uDoui extension
- [ ] No, this needs core changes
- [ ] Not sure

## Additional Context
- Mockups, diagrams, or examples
- Related discussions or issues
